hero.title: Where Every Job Application
hero.description: SyncHire uses AI to power your job search. Intelligently match job requirements, automatically optimize resume content, and stand out from the crowd to find your ideal job opportunity.

features.sectionDescription: From resume optimization to job matching, we provide full-process AI support to make job hunting simple and efficient

smartOptimization.title: Smart Resume Optimization
smartOptimization.description: AI-driven resume analysis that automatically optimizes your resume content for each position

jobMatching.title: Job Matching Analysis
jobMatching.description: Deep analysis of job descriptions to calculate your match score and provide improvement suggestions

oneClickGeneration.title: One-Click Resume Generation
oneClickGeneration.description: Quickly generate targeted resumes based on job requirements, saving 90% editing time

realTimePreview.title: Real-Time Preview
realTimePreview.description: WYSIWYG resume editor with real-time modification preview

dataInsights.title: Data Insights
dataInsights.description: Visual display of how your skills match job requirements

secureReliable.title: Secure & Reliable
secureReliable.description: Enterprise-level data encryption to protect your privacy and job application information

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Job Search Journey?
cta.description: Sign up now to get professional AI job advice and make your resume stand out from candidates
